_metadata.source: fbdi_compare.xlsm VBA CompareFBDI subroutine FieldRow block
_metadata.notes: This VBA version has a simpler FieldRow block than described in some documentation. Only 11 templates have non-default FieldRow values.

bugs.single_fieldrow: VBA determines FieldRow from old filename and uses it for both old and new files. If Oracle moves the header row between releases, comparison breaks silently.
bugs.hardcoded_row4_lastcol: VBA always uses Range('A4').End(xlToRight).Column to find last column, regardless of actual header row position.
